description_long: This vending machine is a retro-styled, rectangular unit with a predominantly red and white color scheme, featuring a weathered and worn exterior. The front panel displays a large 'Nuka Cola' logo in stylized script, a coin slot, a lever, and a product retrieval compartment, all set against a distressed red background. A vertical glass or plastic window on the left side of the front panel suggests a view of the product inventory inside. The sides and back are mostly solid red with black trim and some venting visible on the lower side, while the top is white and slightly rounded. The machine has a cartoon mascot and additional branding on the lower front, adding to its vintage appeal. The overall construction appears robust, likely made of metal with some plastic or glass components.
description: A vintage red and white 'Nuka Cola' vending machine with a weathered finish, prominent branding, and interactive front panel features.
description_view_0: The front view shows the 'Nuka Cola' logo, coin slot, lever, product retrieval slot, a vertical window, and mascot branding.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a red panel with black trim and a vented section near the bottom, with the front panel protruding slightly.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a plain red and white back with black vertical trim and no interactive features.
description_view_3: The right side view shows a solid red panel with black trim and hinges, with the front panel's side profile visible.
attribute_display_panel: A small rectangular display panel is located on the upper right of the front face, above the payment interface, showing a printed price label and possibly instructions.
attribute_payment_interface: A coin slot and a lever are present on the right side of the front panel, with a visible price label indicating coin operation; no card or bill acceptor is visible.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A single round button is visible on the left side of the front panel, below the vertical window; no keypad or multiple selection buttons are present.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A rectangular retrieval slot with a flap is located on the lower right of the front panel, beneath the payment interface.
attribute_branding_or_signage: The front panel features a large 'Nuka Cola' logo in white script, a cartoon mascot, and the word 'ICE COLD' in white text, all prominently displayed on the red background.
